Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 13 22 5 7}I can feel my bond with Aigis grow[n]stronger as we spend time together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship[n]will grow stronger soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
